data.title: Bel Fuse Inc. appoints Tom Smelker as President of Connectivity Solutions on Jan 26, 2026. (chars: 83)
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in West Orange, New Jersey, Bel Fuse Inc. (Nasdaq: BELFA and BELFB) disclosed the naming of Tom Smelker as the President of Connectivity Solutions, beginning his role on January 26, 2026. Bel Fuse Inc. is a notable worldwide producer of items specializing in empowering, safeguarding, and linking electronic circuits.
YEMEN'S PRIME MINISTER SALEM BIN BREIK SUBMITS GOVERNMENT RESIGNATION, PRESIDENTIAL LEADERSHIP COUNCIL ACCEPTS IT -REPORTS

data.title: State Street stock at record highs as earnings come amidst economic optimism following strong results from BlackRock, BNY Mellon.
data.description: State Street has reported robust earnings following impressive results from BlackRock and Bank of New York Mellon. STT stock has surged to all-time highs. This development comes amidst positive economic sentiment, reflecting a trend of success across financial markets.

data.title: Analysts optimistic on digital gaming industry's profit growth this year. DraftKings climbs on analyst comment.
data.description: Industry analysts are optimistic about the digital gaming sector this year, anticipating significant profit growth. DraftKings saw a rise in its stock following positive analyst comments, with a new data-center venture receiving a target hike. This positive outlook suggests a prosperous period for digital gaming companies.

data.title: China's BYD beats Tesla as top EV company, eyes U.S. market under Trump's policy, possibly setting up a breakthrough.
data.description: The Chinese electric vehicle company BYD has surpassed Tesla to become the top EV manufacturer globally. With this milestone, the company is now eyeing a foray into the American car market as President Donald Trump has signaled the potential for Chinese car factories to operate in the U.S. This development brings BYD closer to entering the U.S. market, marking a significant shift in the EV industry. The news of BYD's expansion was first reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Ocular Therapeutix shares fluctuate amid rumors of Sanofi considering higher bid for acquisition.
data.description: Ocular Therapeutix stocks experienced fluctuations on Thursday following reports that Sanofi may make a higher bid to acquire the company. The share prices initially surged, but later underwent a series of ups and downs due to the speculations. This event signifies the potential impact of the rumored increased offer from Sanofi on Ocular Therapeutix's market performance.

data.title: WV bill proposes allowing state treasury to invest in crypto with market cap over $750B, currently limited to Bitcoin.
data.description: The proposed law would permit the state's financial department to possess digital currencies valued at over $750 billion in the market, a restriction that currently applies solely to Bitcoin as of January.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. issues $0.12 per share dividend for January 2026, payable on Feb 13.
data.description: Atlanta-based Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) revealed today that a cash dividend of $0.12 per share of common stock has been declared for January 2026. This dividend is set to be distributed on February 13, 2026 to stockholders recorded as of the announcement date.

data.title: Aimco announces federal income tax allocation for 2025 distributions to holders of Class A stock. NYSE: AIV.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Denver, Apartment Investment and Management Company (Aimco) disclosed the federal income tax breakdown of its 2025 distributions to holders of its Class A Common Stock. The allocation for 2025 is as follows: Class A... The company's stock trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AIV.

data.title: Nabors redeems $379M in senior notes, reducing net debt by $366M in Q4 2025, approx $25/share.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on January 15, 2026, Nabors Industries Ltd. disclosed the complete redemption of its 7.500% Senior Guaranteed Notes due 2028, valued at around $379 million. The redemption took place at par value.

data.title: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) declares $0.205 cash dividend on common shares quarterly. Annual meeting date set.
data.description: In Cleveland on January 15, 2026, KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) released news of its latest dividends for the first quarter. The Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.205 for each outstanding common share (NYSE: KEY). Shareholders can anticipate the dividend payment shortly.

data.title: Labcorp (NYSE: LH) to announce Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026; data to be released before market opens.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Labcorp Holdings Inc. (NYSE: LH), a prominent provider of laboratory services worldwide, announced that it will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 prior to the market opening on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. This disclosure will give investors and stakeholders insights into the company's earnings and operations during this period.

data.title: Carrier Global Corp (NYSE: CARR) will release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 5, 2026, with a conference call at 7:30am ET.
data.description: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on January 15, 2026, Carrier Global Corporation, a prominent player in innovative climate and energy solutions, is set to announce its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CARR, will also conduct a conference call and webcast at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This event is anticipated to provide insights into the company's performance and financial status for the mentioned period.

data.title: Barington Capital withdraws nominees for Matthews' board after engagement on strategic review and governance PITTSBURGH, Jan. 15, 2026 /PRNewswire - Matthews International Corporation (NASDAQ GSM: MATW)
data.description: Barington has decided to remove its nominees from Matthews' Board after discussions covering areas like the continuous strategic evaluation and improvements in corporate governance. The development was announced in Pittsburgh on January 15, 2026. Matthews International Corporation, traded on NASDAQ GSM under the symbol MATW, was the focal point of these engagements.

data.title: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 4, 2026 after market closes.
data.description: In McKinney, Texas, on January 15, 2026, Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) is set to reveal its financial performance for the Fourth Quarter of 2025 after markets close on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. The company's earnings press release for Q4 2025 and other pertinent information will be made available at that time.
